channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Fireworks light up New York City to mark 250 years of US independence
item.description: Fireworks lit up the New York City skyline as America marked its 250th anniversary.

item.title: Severe weather disrupts US’s 250th celebrations
item.description: Trump says he will still speak in Washington, DC, after a thunderstorm delayed celebrations in the US capital.

item.title: This immigrant served in the US military. Now he faces deportation
item.description: Benito Miranda Hernandez completed three tours during the Iraq war but now faces removal from the US to Mexico.

item.title: White nationalists march on Washington DC ahead of Freedom 250 celebrations
item.description: Hundreds of masked white nationalists marched on Washington DC ahead of Freedom 250.

item.title: Iran war live: Huge crowds mourn Khamenei, Trump vows to hold fire
item.description: Iran's late Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei and members of his family were killed in a US-Israeli air strike in February.

item.title: White nationalists march in Washington, DC, area during July 4 festivities
item.description: Donald Trump has faced condemnation for failing to forcefully reject white nationalists during his presidency.

item.title: Ticket prices plunge for USA-Belgium World Cup last-16 match
item.description: The price for the final 2026 World ⁠Cup match in Seattle hit nearly $4,000 but dipped as low as $1,549 ⁠on Tuesday.

item.title: Mbappe draws level with Messi as France beat Paraguay to set up Morocco tie
item.description: Kylian Mbappe moves level with Lionel Messi on seven goals at World Cup 2026 as France beat Paraguay 1-0 in last 16.

item.title: US influence challenged by changing global order: Paolo von Schirach
item.description: US influence challenged by changing global order: Paolo von Schirach

item.title: Masses of Iranians defy heatwave on second day of Khamenei’s funeral
item.description: Iran has marked the second day of funeral processions for its late Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei.

item.title: Lebanon’s Aoun calls on US to keep ‘always standing beside’ his country
item.description: In a congratulatory message on US Independence Day, Aoun says he hopes Lebanon can 'open a new page of hope'.

item.title: Ounahi fires Morocco into World Cup quarterfinals with 3-0 win over Canada
item.description: Azzedine Ounahi scored two of three second-half goals as Morocco ended cohosts run to reach last eight.

item.title: A politically charged holiday: The US celebrates its 250th anniversary
item.description: The semiquincentennial has been meet with controversy, as President Trump seeks to exert influence over the celebration.

item.title: America’s Indigenous Legacy
item.description: The Potomac isn't just the name of a river, it's part of a much older story. Al Jazeera's Emma Withrow explains.

item.title: Has the US reckoned with its own history?
item.description: Marc Lamont Hill speaks to scholar Kimberle Crenshaw on whether the US is sliding backwards on civil rights.

item.title: Will economic pressure move the Kremlin towards talks with Kyiv?
item.description: Relentless Ukrainian strikes on refineries have caused a fuel crisis in Russia.

item.title: At least 20 drown as boat carrying students after exams sinks in DR Congo
item.description: Witnesses say the boat may have been carrying more than 200 passengers.

item.title: Russia’s Medvedev says Strait of Hormuz is Iran’s ‘nuclear weapon’
item.description: Dmitry Medvedev says Iran’s ability to disrupt traffic in the Strait of Hormuz is equivalent to possession of a nuclear.

item.title: Trump hints Israel’s Benjamin Netanyahu may visit US as early as next week
item.description: The visit would mark Netanyahu's seventh visit to the US since Trump returned to office for a second term as president.

item.title: Turkiye’s Erdogan says Israel must not be able to ‘dynamite’ US-Iran deal
item.description: The Turkiye leader has repeatedly accused Israel of trying to undermine the US-Iran memorandum of understanding.

item.title: Paraguay 0-1 France: FIFA World Cup 2026 last 16 – as it happened
item.description: All the updates from our live coverage and text commentary stream as Mbappe's France beat Paraguay 1-0 in last 16.

item.title: Police clash with protesters outside AfD meeting
item.description: German police scuffled with protesters as the far-right Alternative for Germany (AfD) held its national convention

item.title: FIFA World Cup 2026: Best Round of 16 knockout matches to watch
item.description: As the tournament enters the second knockout phase, there are several blockbuster matchups led by Spain-Portugal.

item.title: At least 7 Palestinians killed by Israeli forces over past 48 hours in Gaza
item.description: A further nine bodies were recovered from under the rubble, according to Gaza's Ministry of Health.

item.title: Iran promotes message of continuity and revenge at Khamenei commemoration
item.description: Iran will be shut down on Sunday and Monday to encourage more mourners to join funeral procession.
